basics.name: Mohamed Ragab
basics.label: Senior Researcher
basics.summary: Senior Researcher at TII, developing AI-driven solutions for real-world time series applications including predictive maintenance, healthcare, and manufacturing.

work.name: Technology Innovation Institute (TII)
work.summary: Propulsion & Space Research Center. Leading AI research for jet engine health monitoring and predictive maintenance.
highlights: PI: AI-Based IR Radiation Prediction for Engines (2025-2026)
Co-PI: AI-Based PHM for Jet Engines, USD 300K (2025-2026)

work.name: Technology Innovation Institute (TII)
work.summary: Advanced AI for predictive maintenance of jet engines including anomaly detection, fault diagnostics, and RUL estimation.
highlights: Multimodal integration with Large Language Models for engine health monitoring
Published in KDD 2025, IEEE TASE, IEEE TIM, MSSP

work.name: Center for Frontier AI Research (CFAR), A*STAR
work.summary: Privacy-preserving domain adaptation and continual AI for time series applications.
highlights: PI: Label-Efficient Federated Learning, SGD 150K, A*STAR CDF
Published in ICML 2024, IEEE TPAMI, IEEE TNNLS, KDD 2023

work.name: Institute for Infocomm Research (I2R), A*STAR
work.summary: PhD research on deep transfer learning for predictive maintenance, jointly with NTU.
highlights: Published in IJCAI 2021, IEEE TNNLS, IEEE TII, IEEE TIM

work.name: ST Engineering Aerospace
work.summary: Anomaly detection for aircraft engine predictive maintenance using deep learning.
highlights: LSTM, CNN, and Autoencoder-based anomaly detection
Automatic feature extraction for failure detection

work.name: Aswan University
work.summary: Classroom instruction, graduate assistant training, and undergraduate laboratory supervision.

work.name: Aswan University
work.summary: Teaching assistant for Java, Computer Networks, DSP, and Signals & Systems courses.

highlights: Thesis: Towards Realistic Data-driven Predictive Maintenance: A Deep Transfer Learning-based Approach
Thesis: High-resolution Magnetic Image Reconstruction Based on Compressive Sensing

awards.title: A*STAR Career Development Award
awards.summary: Competitive Career Development Fund (CDF) for the project 'Label-Efficient and Resilient Federated Learning Approach for Time Series Applications' (SGD 150K).

awards.title: Finalist Paper Award
awards.summary: Finalist Paper Award at the 12th IEEE International Conference on Prognostics and Health Management.

awards.title: SINGA PhD Scholarship
awards.summary: Singapore International Graduate Award for PhD studies at NTU.

awards.title: Best Master's Thesis Award
awards.summary: Best Master's Thesis Award in Electrical Engineering.

awards.title: First Class Honours
awards.summary: Bachelor's Degree with First Class Honours in Electrical Engineering.

volunteer.summary: Teaching statistics and data science workshops.

projects.summary: Co-PI: Developing AI solutions for prognostics and health management of jet engines. USD 300K funded by TII.
